blocks.body: Passive voice (Passive Voice) is formed by the formula be + V3 (Past Participle). In this topic, you will learn in detail how to turn active sentences into passive and when to use the passive.

{ "title": "7. Short summary", "items": [ "The basic formula of the passive: Subject + be + V3 (Past Participle).", "Object of the active sentence → Subject of the passive.", "by + agent — indicates the executor (person, organization).", "with + instrument — indicates an instrument or tool.", "The passive is used when the performer is unknown, unimportant or obvious.", "The passive voice is typical for formal, scientific and business style.", "by + agent is omitted if the agent is unknown or unimportant.", "The verb be changes according to tense, V3 does not." ] }
